bird.name: White-cheeked bullfinch
bird.summary: The white-cheeked bullfinch (Pyrrhula leucogenis) is a species of finch in the family Fringillidae. It is found in mountain regions of the…

locations.name: 菲律宾
locations.summary: 菲律賓共和國（他加祿語：Republika ng Pilipinas；英語：Republic of the Philippines）簡稱菲律賓，是東南亞的群島國家。位於西太平洋，北隔呂宋海峽與臺灣相望，南隔西里伯斯海與印度尼西亚相望，西隔…

relations.subject: White-cheeked bullfinch
relations.evidence: It is found in mountain regions of the Philippines on the islands of Luzon and Mindanao

relations.subject: White-cheeked bullfinch
relations.evidence: Its natural habitat is tropical moist montane forests above 1,250 meters above sea level
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。
